summary: Iteration 20 (Fight Night carousel + universal Need-Help CTA + Leavers overhaul) — backend 13/13 tests PASS, frontend UI checks PASS. All specified data-testids render as designed, print position + varsity restriction + names step + design-library empty states all behave correctly. One minor UI observation: [ls-summary-names-note] testid isn't emitted in the summary sidebar (the note text IS present, just missing its data-testid).

ui_bugs.issue: The sidebar 'Names — we'll email you a form after checkout to collect them.' / upload-mode note is rendered but is missing data-testid="ls-summary-names-note" — automation cannot key off it. Text content is present.

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid="ls-summary-names-note" to the names-mode note element inside the Leavers summary sidebar so the UI contract in the review spec is fully honoured.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has grown past 3500 lines — recommend splitting Leavers/Portfolio/Sports catalogues into feature modules for maintainability.
Leavers checkout stores full data-URL uploads in db.leavers_artwork (up to ~6 MB each) — fine for now but consider offloading to object storage if volume grows.
/api/leavers/checkout accepts arbitrary front_design_id/back_design_id strings without verifying they exist in db.portfolio — this is lenient by design but could accept junk IDs. Not blocking.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed portfolio items via /api/admin/portfolio for fight-night-action + all 3 new leavers-* categories and soft-delete them in the finally block. Leavers checkout tests create real payment_transactions rows with a live Stripe test key — these accumulate in the DB but are marked payment_status=pending.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints from iteration 20 verified end-to-end: /api/leavers/config, /api/leavers/products (allows_full_front), /api/leavers/checkout (breast, full_front upcharge, varsity 400, invalid position, invalid names_mode, no-design 400, back-only OK, names file persisted to db.leavers_artwork). Portfolio: 4 new categories accepted and rendered on public listing. Frontend: /fight-night-tee replaces old fn-gallery with fn-portfolio-carousel-empty state (WhatsApp copy present, no live link because no admin uploads seeded on this env). /leavers-hoodies/start renders steps 3-7 with all specified testids after picking a garment; full-front toggle updates sidebar note; varsity auto-reverts + toast; front/back design libraries show ls-front-design-empty / ls-back-design-empty; names upload switches to file-block. /design shows designer-need-help; /product/personalised-tee shows specials-need-help; /product/school-hoodie correctly OMITS specials-need-help.
rca of the issue: No RCA needed — all critical paths pass.
